title: oxydectes polyandra
side_effects: Oxydectes polyandra can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory issues due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to its extracts may also cause liver and kidney damage, as well as gastrointestinal problems like nausea and vomiting. In severe cases, improper use of Oxydectes polyandra can lead to seizures, coma, or even death. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using any plant-based remedies to avoid these adverse effects.
